property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Users\extdev01\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\PuTTY\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\apache-maven-3.9.12-bin\apache-maven-3.9.12 in;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;C:\Users\extdev01
vm;C:\Users\extdev01
odejs;C:\Users\extdev01\Documents\Programas\apache-maven-3.9.9-bin.zip\apache-maven-3.9.9 in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17 in;C:\Program Files\;C:\Users\extdev01\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\extdev01\AppData\Local\Python in;C:\Users\extdev01\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\extdev01\AppData\Local\Programs\Git\cmd;C:\Users\extdev01\AppData\Roaming
pm;.

testcase.name: [1:12] Login exitoso con credenciales válidas
[2:38] Login sin email devuelve 400
testcase.system-out:
17:58:54.578 [main] INFO com.intuit.karate - karate.env system property was: null 17:58:54.588 [main] DEBUG com.intuit.karate - request: 1 > POST https://serverest.dev/login 1 > Content-Type: application/json; charset=UTF-8 1 > Content-Length: 23 1 > Host: serverest.dev 1 > Connection: Keep-Alive 1 > User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/17.0.12) 1 > Accept-Encoding: gzip,deflate {"password":"teste123"}
17:58:55.076 [main] DEBUG com.intuit.karate - response time in milliseconds: 487 1 < 400 1 < access-control-allow-origin: * 1 < x-dns-prefetch-control: off 1 < x-frame-options: SAMEORIGIN 1 < strict-transport-security: max-age=15552000; includeSubDomains 1 < x-download-options: noopen 1 < x-content-type-options: nosniff 1 < x-xss-protection: 1; mode=block 1 < content-type: application/json; charset=utf-8 1 < x-cloud-trace-context: d20e3feb912c41937afce920338ab633 1 < date: Tue, 17 Mar 2026 22:58:56 GMT 1 < server: Google Frontend 1 < Content-Length: 40 { "email": "email é obrigatório" }

testcase.name: [6:88] Usar token obtenido para acceder a endpoint protegido

17:59:02.712 [main] INFO com.intuit.karate - karate.env system property was: null 17:59:02.717 [main] DEBUG com.intuit.karate - request: 1 > GET https://serverest.dev/usuarios 1 > Content-Type: application/json 1 > Host: serverest.dev 1 > Connection: Keep-Alive 1 > User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/17.0.12) 1 > Accept-Encoding: gzip,deflate
17:59:03.497 [main] DEBUG com.intuit.karate - response time in milliseconds: 779 1 < 200 1 < access-control-allow-origin: * 1 < x-dns-prefetch-control: off 1 < x-frame-options: SAMEORIGIN 1 < strict-transport-security: max-age=15552000; includeSubDomains 1 < x-download-options: noopen 1 < x-content-type-options: nosniff 1 < x-xss-protection: 1; mode=block 1 < content-type: application/json; charset=utf-8 1 < x-cloud-trace-context: 56f3f86296d62c625bf61b5be8ca81ea 1 < date: Tue, 17 Mar 2026 22:59:04 GMT 1 < server: Google Frontend 1 < Content-Length: 12780 { testcase.name: [1.4:28] Listar usuarios usando filtros - filtrar administradores
[1:12] Registro exitoso devuelve 201
testcase.system-out:
17:59:04.365 [main] INFO com.intuit.karate - karate.env system property was: null 17:59:04.378 [main] DEBUG com.intuit.karate - request: 1 > POST https://serverest.dev/usuarios 1 > Content-Type: application/json; charset=UTF-8 1 > Content-Length: 107 1 > Host: serverest.dev 1 > Connection: Keep-Alive 1 > User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/17.0.12) 1 > Accept-Encoding: gzip,deflate {"nome":"Usuario Test","email":"usuario_1773788344370@qa.com","password":"teste123","administrador":"true"}

testcase.name: [2:30] Registrar con email ya existente devuelve 400
[1:13] Buscar usuario existente por ID devuelve 200
[2:48] Buscar usuario con ID inexistente devuelve 400
